message:
Fix e2e tests to use transcriptId for URL routing

- Update getTranscript query to look up by transcriptId instead of database id
- Update all transcript links to use transcriptId in URLs
- Fix dashboard tests to look for link element instead of heading for AgentLogs
- Fix dashboard tests to expect short repo names instead of full URLs

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/321a0ca3-15e5-4d21-9b7c-012f1cf9cc41

files.patch:
@@ -92,7 +92,7 @@ function PrivateDetailComponent() {
                   </TableCell>
                   <TableCell className="text-right">
                     <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" asChild>
-                      <Link to="/app/logs/$id" params={{ id: transcript.id }}>
+                      <Link to="/app/logs/$id" params={{ id: transcript.transcriptId }}>
                         View
                       </Link>
                     </Button>

@@ -92,7 +92,7 @@ function RepoDetailComponent() {
                   </TableCell>
                   <TableCell className="text-right">
                     <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" asChild>
-                      <Link to="/app/logs/$id" params={{ id: transcript.id }}>
+                      <Link to="/app/logs/$id" params={{ id: transcript.transcriptId }}>
                         View
                       </Link>
                     </Button>
